title: SEC Grants 2 Digital Exchanges “Approval-in-Principle - FinancialEDGE
description: In furtherance of its commitment to enabling innovation that would deepen the capital market while guaranteeing the protection of investors, the Securities and Exchange Commission has granted two (2) Digital Assets Exchanges “Approval-in-Principle” to commence operation under the Accelerated Regulatory Incubation Program, ARIP. The companies granted approval are Busha Digital Limited, Quidax Technologies Limited. Disclosing this in
html:
In furtherance of its commitment to enabling innovation that would deepen the capital market while guaranteeing the protection of investors, the Securities and Exchange Commission has granted two (2) Digital Assets Exchanges “Approval-in-Principle” to commence operation under the Accelerated Regulatory Incubation Program, ARIP.   
The companies granted approval are Busha Digital Limited, Quidax Technologies Limited.
